src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Update the copyright year range and project description in the file header.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Changed 'Teragrep Azure Eventhub Reader' to 'Teragrep syslog bridge for Microsoft Azure EventHub' and updated copyright to '2023-2025'.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Replace manual single-connection management with a connection pool abstraction for better concurrency and resource management.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Replaced `RelpConnection` field and manual connect/reconnect logic with `Pool<IManagedRelpConnection>` and `UnboundPool`.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Switch from the old `RelpConfig` to the new `RelpConnectionConfig` to align with updated library interfaces.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Changed import and constructor parameter from `RelpConfig` to `RelpConnectionConfig`.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Introduce explicit SSL context handling via a supplier to support modern TLS configurations.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Added `SSLContextSupplier` parameter to the constructor and passed it to `ManagedRelpConnectionWithMetricsFactory`.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Delegate metrics collection to the underlying connection factory instead of managing counters and timers manually.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Removed `Counter` and `Timer` fields and their manual incrementing logic, relying on `ManagedRelpConnectionWithMetricsFactory`.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Simplify the message sending logic by using the pool's managed connection interface.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Replaced manual batch creation, commit loops, and retry logic with `connection.ensureSent(batch)` and pool offer/get.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Add detailed debug logging to trace the lifecycle of batch processing and connection usage.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Added `LOGGER.debug` statements for accepting batches, preparing to send, and offering connections back to the pool.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Remove the custom `toString` implementation as it is no longer needed or relevant with the new structure.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Deleted the `toString()` method that previously returned address and port details.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/ErrorC.human_impl: Changed 'Teragrep Azure Eventhub Reader' to 'Teragrep syslog bridge for Microsoft Azure EventHub' and updated copyright to '2023-2025'.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Introduce Codahale Metrics registry and reporters for application monitoring.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added imports for MetricRegistry, JmxReporter, and Slf4jReporter.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Add support for a pluggable architecture using the akv_01 and aer_01 plugin interfaces.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added imports for PluginMap, MappedPluginFactories, and WrappedPluginFactoryWithConfig.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Integrate the rlp_01 client library for RELP (Reliable Event Logging Protocol) connections.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added imports for IManagedRelpConnection, ManagedRelpConnectionStub, and Pool.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Add Prometheus metrics export capabilities using the prometheus-metrics library.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added imports for PrometheusMetricsServlet and DropwizardExports.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Integrate Jetty EE10 server for hosting the Prometheus metrics endpoint.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added imports for org.eclipse.jetty.ee10.servlet and org.eclipse.jetty.server.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Introduce SLF4J logging for the main application class.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added import for org.slf4j.Logger and LoggerFactory.
